//: TEMPLATE -- copy the contents below into YOUR FE8 hack/decomp workspace's .vscode/settings.json, then adjust the paths to match your project layout. Do not place this file in poryscript-fe8 itself. All paths are resolved relative to the .pory file's workspace folder unless absolute.
//commandConfigFilepath: FE8 poryscript command config (DSL name -> EAstdlib macro). Point this at the command_config.fe8.json shipped with laqieer/poryscript-fe8.
//fontConfigFilepath: FE8 font width config, for text line-length validation.
//commandIncludes: Files the language server parses for `.macro` blocks to learn the available poryscript commands. FE8 has no asm/macros/event.inc, so use the generated includes from this repo's vscode/ directory. Adjust the path to wherever you keep poryscript-fe8.
//symbolIncludes: Headers parsed for #define constants so symbols like song/item/character IDs get highlighting + completion in .pory files. Point `file` at your FE8 decomp constant headers. Add one entry per header (or use a glob your build copies in). `expression` must have a capture group for the symbol name; `type` of `define` matches C #define lines.
